name: Pork Chops with Honey & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a large skillet with vegetable oil spray.
2. Place the skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add pork chops to the hot skillet and brown for 1 minute on each side.
4. Reduce the heat to medium.
5. Cook the pork chops for about 8 minutes, turning them and cooking an additional 5 minutes more until they are done.
6. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, stir together lemon juice, soy sauce (low sodium), minced garlic, and remaining honey.
7. Set aside.
8. Remove the pork chops from the skillet when they are done. Keep warm.
9. Add the honey mixture to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Pour the honey mixture over the pork chops.
